사무엘하 3:1.content: Now there was long war between Saul’s house and David’s house. David grew stronger and stronger, but Saul’s house grew weaker and weaker.

사무엘하 3:2.content: Sons were born to David in Hebron. His firstborn was Amnon, of Ahinoam the Jezreelitess;

사무엘하 3:3.content: and his second, Chileab, of Abigail the wife of Nabal the Carmelite; and the third, Absalom the son of Maacah the daughter of Talmai king of Geshur;

사무엘하 3:4.content: and the fourth, Adonijah the son of Haggith; and the fifth, Shephatiah the son of Abital;

사무엘하 3:5.content: and the sixth, Ithream, of Eglah, David’s wife. These were born to David in Hebron.

사무엘하 3:6.content: While there was war between Saul’s house and David’s house, Abner made himself strong in Saul’s house.

사무엘하 3:7.content: Now Saul had a concubine, whose name was Rizpah, the daughter of Aiah; and Ishbosheth said to Abner, “Why have you gone in to my father’s concubine?”

사무엘하 3:8.content: Then Abner was very angry about Ishbosheth’s words, and said, “Am I a dog’s head that belongs to Judah? Today I show kindness to Saul’s house your father, to his brothers, and to his friends, and have not delivered you into the hand of David; and yet you charge me today with a fault concerning this woman!

사무엘하 3:9.content: God do so to Abner, and more also, if, as Yahweh has sworn to David, I don’t do even so to him;

사무엘하 3:10.content: to transfer the kingdom from Saul’s house, and to set up David’s throne over Israel and over Judah, from Dan even to Beersheba.”

사무엘하 3:11.content: He could not answer Abner another word, because he was afraid of him.

사무엘하 3:12.content: Abner sent messengers to David on his behalf, saying, “Whose is the land?” and saying, “Make your alliance with me, and behold, my hand will be with you, to bring all Israel around to you.”

사무엘하 3:13.content: He said, “Good. I will make a treaty with you, but one thing I require of you. That is, you will not see my face unless you first bring Michal, Saul’s daughter, when you come to see my face.”

사무엘하 3:14.content: David sent messengers to Ishbosheth, Saul’s son, saying, “Deliver me my wife Michal, whom I was given to marry for one hundred foreskins of the Philistines.”

사무엘하 3:15.content: Ishbosheth sent and took her from her husband, even from Paltiel the son of Laish.

사무엘하 3:16.content: Her husband went with her, weeping as he went, and followed her to Bahurim. Then Abner said to him, “Go! Return!” and he returned.

사무엘하 3:17.content: Abner had communication with the elders of Israel, saying, “In times past, you sought for David to be king over you.

사무엘하 3:18.content: Now then do it; for Yahweh has spoken of David, saying, ‘By the hand of my servant David, I will save my people Israel out of the hand of the Philistines, and out of the hand of all their enemies.’ ”

사무엘하 3:19.content: Abner also spoke in the ears of Benjamin: and Abner went also to speak in the ears of David in Hebron all that seemed good to Israel, and to the whole house of Benjamin.

사무엘하 3:20.content: So Abner came to David to Hebron, and twenty men with him. David made Abner and the men who were with him a feast.

사무엘하 3:21.content: Abner said to David, “I will arise and go, and will gather all Israel to my lord the king, that they may make a covenant with you, and that you may reign over all that your soul desires.” David sent Abner away; and he went in peace.

사무엘하 3:22.content: Behold, David’s servants and Joab came from a raid, and brought in a great plunder with them; but Abner was not with David in Hebron; for he had sent him away, and he had gone in peace.

사무엘하 3:23.content: When Joab and all the army who was with him had come, they told Joab, “Abner the son of Ner came to the king, and he has sent him away, and he has gone in peace.”

사무엘하 3:24.content: Then Joab came to the king, and said, “What have you done? Behold, Abner came to you. Why is it that you have sent him away, and he is already gone?

사무엘하 3:25.content: You know Abner the son of Ner. He came to deceive you, and to know your going out and your coming in, and to know all that you do.”

사무엘하 3:26.content: When Joab had come out from David, he sent messengers after Abner, and they brought him back from the well of Sirah; but David didn’t know it.

사무엘하 3:27.content: When Abner was returned to Hebron, Joab took him aside into the middle of the gate to speak with him quietly, and struck him there in the body, so that he died, for the blood of Asahel his brother.

사무엘하 3:28.content: Afterward, when David heard it, he said, “I and my kingdom are guiltless before Yahweh forever of the blood of Abner the son of Ner.

사무엘하 3:29.content: Let it fall on the head of Joab, and on all his father’s house. Let there not fail from the house of Joab one who has a discharge, or who is a leper, or who leans on a staff, or who falls by the sword, or who lacks bread.”

사무엘하 3:30.content: So Joab and Abishai his brother killed Abner, because he had killed their brother Asahel at Gibeon in the battle.

사무엘하 3:31.content: David said to Joab, and to all the people who were with him, “Tear your clothes, and clothe yourselves with sackcloth, and mourn in front of Abner.” King David followed the bier.

사무엘하 3:32.content: They buried Abner in Hebron; and the king lifted up his voice, and wept at Abner’s grave; and all the people wept.

사무엘하 3:33.content: The king lamented for Abner, and said, “Should Abner die as a fool dies?

사무엘하 3:34.content: Your hands weren’t bound, and your feet weren’t put into fetters. As a man falls before the children of iniquity, so you fell.” All the people wept again over him.

사무엘하 3:35.content: All the people came to urge David to eat bread while it was yet day; but David swore, saying, “God do so to me, and more also, if I taste bread, or anything else, until the sun goes down.”

사무엘하 3:36.content: All the people took notice of it, and it pleased them; as whatever the king did pleased all the people.

사무엘하 3:37.content: So all the people and all Israel understood that day that it was not of the king to kill Abner the son of Ner.

사무엘하 3:38.content: The king said to his servants, “Don’t you know that a prince and a great man has fallen today in Israel?

사무엘하 3:39.content: I am weak today, though anointed king. These men, the sons of Zeruiah are too hard for me. May Yahweh reward the evildoer according to his wickedness.”
